Bash(sleep 2 && curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"email":"admin@waterflo.in","password":"admin123"}' -c /tmp/wf_cookies && echo "" && curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/admin/dashboard -b /tmp/wf_cookies | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\);console.log\('Dashboard:', j.totalProducts, 'products,', j.totalUsers, 'users,', j.brandStats.length, 'brands'\)}\)")
Bash(curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/admin/products?brand_id=strongfit-cpvc -b /tmp/waterflo-cookies.txt 2>/dev/null | head -c 200 || echo "Need to login first")

Bash(curl -s -c /tmp/waterflo-cookies.txt -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"email":"admin@waterflo.in","password":"admin123"}' && echo "" && curl -s -b /tmp/waterflo-cookies.txt "http://localhost:3000/api/admin/products?brand_id=strongfit-cpvc" | node -e "var d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\)\); console.log\('Products:', d.products.length\); console.log\('Categories:', [...new Set\(d.products.map\(p=>p.category\)\)]\); console.log\('Sample:', JSON.stringify\(d.products[0]\)\);")

Bash(mkdir -p "$TEMP/waterflo-test" && curl -s -b /tmp/waterflo-cookies.txt "http://localhost:3000/api/admin/products?brand_id=strongfit-cpvc" > "$TEMP/waterflo-test/products.json" && node -e "var d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(process.env.TEMP+'/waterflo-test/products.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('Products:', d.products.length\); var cats = [...new Set\(d.products.map\(function\(p\){return p.category}\)\)]; console.log\('Categories:', cats\); var subs = [...new Set\(d.products.map\(function\(p\){return p.category+'|'+p.subcategory}\)\)]; console.log\('SubCats:', subs.length\);")
